{{ mode === 'edit' ? 'Edit vendor' : 'Create vendor' }}
Vendor name Vendor name is required. Address Phone no GST PAN Food license no Priority Priority is required. Priority must be an integer. Status Active Inactive Status is required.
Vendor invoice template
Enable template-based parsing Template JSON Paste a JSON template (stored on the vendor) that MW will use when scanning PDFs for this vendor. If parsing fails, MW falls back to the default OCR parser. Invalid JSON. Fix formatting and try again.
Save the vendor first, then paste the template JSON.
Editing/clearing templates is Admin-only.
